channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Nielsen Norman Group
item.description: Nielsen Norman Group UX research and consulting firm (NN/g), founded by Jakob Nielsen and Don Norman.

item.title: Heather Hedden
item.description: Heather Hedden Taxonomist and author of The Accidental Taxonomist (book and blog), a long-running reference on practical taxonomy and metadata design.

item.title: Enterprise Knowledge LLC
item.description: Enterprise Knowledge LLC Consulting firm specializing in knowledge management, taxonomy/ontology design, and enterprise search & findability.

item.title: Baymard Institute
item.description: Baymard Institute Independent UX research institute focused on e-commerce usability.

item.title: Elzbieta Jakubowska
item.description: Elzbieta Jakubowska Software developer with 9+ years of search expertise, based in Kraków.

item.title: global_toc
item.description: Global Table of Contents A map of every note in the vault organized by category and theme.

item.title: All about Information Retrieval & Search
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Index
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.
